reviews.review_description: The story is engaging. The environment and character art is awesome. The sounds and music are satisfying and atmospheric (respectively). This is a game with much to offer and presumably more to come. Variety in objectives will be key to the game’s lasting appeal (or lack thereof), as there is potential for gradual disinterest due to repetition (ie, get through here, shooting baddies on the way, and again, and again). Side missions and improved NPC interactions would be welcomed. Overall, very very cool feel and experience. I enjoy it.

.....  The PROS .....
Very smooth with Nice graphics with mirror tracing techniques being used (i assume) for reflections. love the potential of this title! A straight up shooter with a campaign, climbing, slow motion and its Straight Forward etc

.... The Cons.... 
Disappointing A.i voices and character models.. and i don't like the mission set up... its overly linear... like just go to point A, now go point B, now go to point C.. i like simple but where is the creativity in 2025 🎨hopefully good updates come. i will still give this game a 4 because i still Like it, it attempts at good graphics on the floors but as the other reviewer said  the script kinda bland and linear and i think after this game ima also stop putting my hopes up too high.. its a cool game... but in 2025 there should be more VR INTERACTIVE THINGS.  COULD OF JUST STAYED ON FLAT SCREEN. ❗

Can be a GREAT game with some TLC.. lots of potential still ☑

UPDATE: as of 2025  JUN 5


save your money ❗ this was a con of a Game.  The develper of this Game does not Talk, does not communicate. Check the Empty Discord if im Lying.  This Game does no Updates and even if it did the developer isnt passionate enough or experienced Enough to deliver anything worth it. many other games better then this. wish i cam Refund but i cant. I Gave up trying to convince the develper to show signs of Life. ❗❗❗  i have gave you and UNDESERVED 4 initially,  but the Reality shows why this game Review tank .... no passion no love = low profit and bad reviews... good day.. enjoy my $30

developer_response.body: Sorry you feel that way but I'm constantly working on updates as we speak. As a solo developer I have no choice but to put in a lot of hours on development. I'm working on the arcade challenge mode, time trials & also the PC update that will be cross buy.  Thanks for the feedback but I'm working on Distortion updates everyday.

reviews.review_description:
Broken, unfinished, A.I. assets absolutely everywhere.

Small developers should be supported, but make smaller games.

Dont replace talent, time and ideas with A.I.

Just awful.

The reviews for this game raise serious questions for Meta about review manipulation. Bewildering.

reviews.review_title: A sleeper hit from a newer developer!
reviews.review_description: This is exactly the kind of game VR needs to sell more headsets, the game’s cyberpunk visuals and settings look fabulous and the game is as challenging as it is fun with a great dystopian soundtrack to boot. It’s developers like this that will pave the way for VR as a platform, I eagerly look forward to seeing what they’ll work on next.

It's like someone printed out a blueprint for a great game, framed it, and called it a day.

I was hoping for a Deus Ex-style dystopian open world. What I got was a brief, linear campaign that wraps up in about two hours, just enough time to realize nothing actually works properly. There are three enemy NPCs who can’t handle basic zigzag movement, and five others who just stand there like background props in a high school play.

You can't drive any of the cars, despite being surrounded by them. The voice acting is flat, there’s no surround audio when you receive instructions from an NPC, cutscenes rely on AI art, and lag spikes happen regularly. The mission menu even closes itself when you try to check objectives, possibly out of embarrassment.

One review mentioned the dev is listening to the community etc...I’ve yet to find a website, let alone a way to contact the developers. After this, I'm taking a break from getting my hopes up about the next great VR game. It’s starting to feel like a hobby based entirely on disappointment.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for all your feedback, really appreciate it. I definitely want to move Distortion in the more open world Dues Ex direction.  Dues Ex is one of my biggest inspirations. I'm a solo developer but I plan to constantly make regular updates & add more content.  Feel free to message me at anytime.
https://www.facebook.com/futurementalgames

reviews.review_description:
After spending a few hours immersed in Distortion VR, I have developed high expectations for its potential, especially considering it was created by a solo developer. The game's captivating story drew me in, making me feel genuinely invested in the mission to save the cyberpunk megacity. The gun controls are straightforward, allowing for quick engagement, while the enemies present an unpredictable challenge—some rush at you, while others lie in wait, ready to ambush.

I found the enemy behavior to be suitably aggressive, which adds to the fast-paced nature of the game. However, players should take their time when navigating corners; rushing in can lead to a swift demise before reaching the end of a level. Although there are some minor issues, like missing colliders and occasional clipping that can affect immersion, I was able to overlook these flaws and still thoroughly enjoy my experience.

That said, I do wish the release date was postponed to allow for further polishing. The developer has shown a commendable dedication to the project, being receptive and responsive to player feedback, and actively working on improvements. This commitment gives me confidence that Distortion VR has the potential to be an outstanding title in the genre.

A fantastic game, with great visuals and a cool setting. It's extremely straightforward and, at times, really difficult, but I was immediately captivated and consistently motivated to continue. I'm having a lot of fun with it, and the price is completely reasonable.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing!! Glad you enjoying it, stay tuned for more future updates & content.

reviews.review_description: This game has potential to go on for ever as the solo dev is constantly taken on board comments and suggestions to improve the gaming experience for all of us ,

developer_response.body: Thanks for support. Glad you enjoying it.. Stay tuned for more updates & content soon.

reviews.review_description:
The first time playing, I found myself staring out the window at the speeding hovercars and dancing holograms. While the game begins with linear style corridors, I really enjoyed the rooftop levels that open up even more. The "aim down to reload" style works nicely as you move through the levels.

The gameplay and mechanics are reminiscent of games like System Critical 2, delivering a solid, fun trip through the futuristic landscape. Can't wait to see what comes next!

Nex game who developer said that in the future we will have a more updates. This is generally game for 1 Hour max. From the visual site is poor, music ok but visual side is poor Meta City Patrol looks better. Music is the best in this game, thats why 2 / 5.

I am optimistic about this game. Love the story concept. Love the atmosphere. But the gameplay feels broken. I know it is new, with a very small developer team, so I am trying to be patient. However, I couldn't even complete the tutorial because I spent 10 minutes trying to clime a fire escape and kept falling through the floors, so I quite. I reloaded and tried to go into the game, but could not get my gun to reload, so I kept dying. I think once this gets smoothed out I will revisit this game. It looks very promising.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! You reload the default pistol simply by lowering it down to the waist area. Other weapons that are lying around don't reload; they are disposable. Climbing works like it does in most VR games, using the grips to hold and pull yourself up. I have instruction signs in the tutorial, but I'll add a voiceover in the next update in case people miss this.

reviews.review_description: The tutorial doesn't teach you how to reload and, I had to figure that out on my own by failed run three, it's done apparently flipping the gun downwards and by run five, that no longer and how convenient the refund windows is closed. This review started at 3 stars and just being reminded of that, I had to destroy one star from the rating. Expect huge losses until you fix your clunky wonky game

reviews.review_title: Cyberpunk w/ fast shooting always wins
reviews.review_description: Awesome game! The fact that it’s a solo dev is extremely impressive and it’s always nice to see one that’s this responsive to feedback. Solid gameplay with a lot of potential for some great world building. As a shoot-em-up the pacing is nice. I look forward to more form this developer.
Great video game environment fun maps but really basic ai and guns. Gameplay is entertaining. Could be much improved and sadly looks the same as the several years old version on Steam

The game is good! However, it really lacks a co-op mode like in Path of the Warrior — playing together with a friend would make it much more fun. Unfortunately, the game is full of bugs and glitches, which seriously ruin the experience. That’s why my rating is 3 out of 5.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing.  I plan on adding co-op mode in a future update.  If you can, please let me know what bugs & glitches you find. I'm doing constant updates to address any issues. Feel free to message me on facebook.com/futurementalgames
Thanks
